content: The rooms included in group will be displayed in the All Rooms section.

comment.text: This text explains where the rooms belonging to a group will be shown after the group is removed. It appears within a dialog (likely a "Delete Group Dialog") and informs the user about the destination of those rooms. Translators should ensure clarity regarding the location of the rooms.

usage.context:
{t("GroupingRooms:RemoveGroupConfirmation")}
 </Text>
 <Text style={{ marginTop: "16px" }} lineHeight="24px">
 <Trans
 t={t}
 i18nKey="GroupingRooms:RemoveGroupInfo"
 components={{ strong: <strong style={{ fontWeight: 700 }} /> }}
 />
 </Text>
 </ModalDialog.Body>
 <ModalDialog.Footer>
